## Identity

The dry bureaucratic record of who owed how many salted eels to whom, kept
scrupulously right up until the war made the numbers academic.

## Quotes

> "Owed: one (1) war. Paid: zero (0). Carried forward, indefinitely, to
> whichever heir is left holding the quill."

— entry, Salted-Eel Tithe Ledger, `sources/chapters/asalt-ledger-01.md:1`
